attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT COALESCE(EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.ADDRESS1,'UNK') as ADDRESS1, 
COALESCE(EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.ADDRESS2,'UNK') as ADDRESS2, 
COALESCE(EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.ADDRESS3,'UNK') as ADDRESS3,
COALESCE(EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.ATTRIBUTE1,'UNK') as ATTRIBUTE1, 
COALESCE(EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.ATTRIBUTE2,'UNK') as ATTRIBUTE2,
COALESCE(EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.ATTRIBUTE3,'UNK') as ATTRIBUTE3,
COALESCE(EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.ATTRIBUTE4,'UNK') as ATTRIBUTE4,
TRIM(EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.COUNTRY_CODE) as COUNTRY_CODE, 
EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.COUNTRY_NAME as COUNTRY_NAME, 
EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.CURRENCY_CODE as CURRENCY_CODE, 
COALESCE(EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.EMAIL,'UNK') as EMAIL, 
EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.EURO_CURRENCY as EURO_CURRENCY, 
EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.GES_UPDATE_DATE as GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
TRIM(EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.GLOBAL_NAME) as GLOBAL_NAME, 
EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.IC_ACCOUNT as IC_ACCOUNT, 
EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID as SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, 
EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.SOURCE_SOB_ID as SOURCE_SOB_ID,
COALESCE(EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING.VAT_NUMBER,'UNK') as VAT_NUMBER FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING
attributes.Lookup condition: COUNTRY_CODE = in_COUNTRY_CODE AND GLOBAL_NAME = in_GLOBAL_NAME AND SOURCE_SOB_ID = in_SOURCE_SOB_ID

groups.name: UPDATE
groups.expression:
IIF(NOT ISNULL(LKP_COUNTRY_CODE) AND 
NOT ISNULL(LKP_GLOBAL_NAME) AND 
NOT ISNULL(LKP_SOURCE_SOB_ID) AND 
(IIF(ISNULL(LKP_ADDRESS1),'UNK',LKP_ADDRESS1)  != IIF(ISNULL(ADDRESS1),'UNK',ADDRESS1) OR        
IIF(ISNULL(LKP_ADDRESS2),'UNK',LKP_ADDRESS2)  != IIF(ISNULL(ADDRESS2),'UNK',ADDRESS2) OR   
IIF(ISNULL(LKP_ADDRESS3),'UNK',LKP_ADDRESS3)  != IIF(ISNULL(ADDRESS3),'UNK',ADDRESS3) OR   
IIF(ISNULL(LKP_ATTRIBUTE1),'UNK',LKP_ATTRIBUTE1)  != IIF(ISNULL(ATTRIBUTE1),'UNK',ATTRIBUTE1) OR   
IIF(ISNULL(LKP_ATTRIBUTE2),'UNK',LKP_ATTRIBUTE2)  != IIF(ISNULL(ATTRIBUTE2),'UNK',ATTRIBUTE2) OR   
IIF(ISNULL(LKP_ATTRIBUTE3),'UNK',LKP_ATTRIBUTE3)  != IIF(ISNULL(ATTRIBUTE3),'UNK',ATTRIBUTE3) OR  
IIF(ISNULL(LKP_ATTRIBUTE4),'UNK',LKP_ATTRIBUTE4)  != IIF(ISNULL(ATTRIBUTE4),'UNK',ATTRIBUTE4) OR  
LKP_COUNTRY_NAME != COUNTRY_NAME OR
IIF(ISNULL(LKP_EMAIL),'UNK',LKP_EMAIL)  != IIF(ISNULL(EMAIL),'UNK',EMAIL) OR   
LKP_EURO_CURRENCY != EURO_CURRENCY OR
LKP_GES_UPDATE_DATE != GES_UPDATE_DATE OR
LKP_IC_ACCOUNT != IC_ACCOUNT OR
LKP_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID != SET_OF_BOOKS_ID OR  
IIF(ISNULL(LKP_VAT_NUMBER),'UNK',LKP_VAT_NUMBER) != IIF(ISNULL(VAT_NUMBER),'UNK',VAT_NUMBER)),TRUE,FALSE)
